This is a testharness.js-based test.
Harness Error. harness_status.status = 1 , harness_status.message = Uncaught Error: assert_true: Video should fire play event after scrolling into view expected true got false
[FAIL] Video with loading=lazy and autoplay does not play while not visible, then plays once scrolled into view
  assert_true: Video should be paused when not visible in viewport expected true got false
Harness: the test ran to completion.
